name: JEWELERS CASH FOR GOLD & SILVER EXCHANGE
description_short: Dallas Gold & Silver Exchange buys and sells precious metals, fine jewelry, luxury watches, and bullion across 7 North Texas locations with 40+ years of experience.
description_long:
Dallas Gold & Silver Exchange (DGSE) is a North Texas-based precious metals and jewelry dealer established over 40 years ago. The company operates 7 physical locations across the Dallas-Fort Worth area (Dallas, Frisco, Grand Prairie, Grapevine, Lewisville, Euless, and Fort Worth) and positions itself as a buyer and seller of high-value items rather than a traditional pawn shop.

DGSE's core services include buying and selling fine jewelry, engagement rings, luxury watches, and gold/silver bullion. They also offer jewelry repair and watch repair services. The company emphasizes authentication and verification, stating "We don't pay full price so neither should you" and positioning authenticity as a core value—explicitly rejecting counterfeits and fakes.

The company distinguishes itself through longevity, customer service focus, and community involvement. Customer reviews highlight personalized service, knowledgeable staff, proactive customer care (including unsolicited repairs), and a welcoming environment with complimentary beverages. DGSE claims to support local Dallas/Fort Worth causes and emphasize environmental responsibility. The business model appears designed around repeat customers and relationship-building rather than transactional efficiency.

As a precious metals and jewelry buyer, DGSE functions as a secondary market for consumers liquidating items or trading up. The company does not appear to offer loans or credit products—it is purely a buy/sell/repair operation. Consumers should understand they will not receive full retail value for items sold, which the company explicitly acknowledges.
pros: 40+ years of operating history in North Texas with established customer base and repeat clientele
Multiple physical locations (7 across DFW) for convenient access and local service
Explicitly emphasizes authentication and rejection of counterfeits—addresses major consumer concern
Offers both buying/selling AND repair services (jewelry and watch repair) in-house
Customer reviews consistently highlight friendly, knowledgeable staff and personalized service
Proactive customer care demonstrated (e.g., unsolicited repairs, attention to detail)
Trades in or appraises stones/materials for alternative value beyond cash payment
cons: Does not pay full retail or market value for items—intentional business model that disadvantages sellers
Limited to North Texas geography—no online buying/selling or national reach despite website presence
No transparent pricing or valuation methodology published; must visit in-person for appraisals
Website content is primarily marketing; no FAQs, valuation guides, or educational resources about what they buy
No information about whether they offer loans/collateral-based advances—operates purely as a buyer/seller
best_for: North Texas residents liquidating jewelry, watches, or precious metals they no longer wear or need
Consumers seeking to trade in engagement rings or fine jewelry for cash or store credit
People with luxury watches or bullion seeking a local, established buyer with authentication verification
Customers needing professional jewelry or watch repair from a dealer with verified expertise
diagnosis: DGSE is best for North Texas consumers who own jewelry, watches, or bullion and want to liquidate or trade up with a trusted local dealer. The primary caveat is that this is a buy/sell operation—not a loan provider—and customers will receive below-market prices in exchange for quick, authenticated transactions and professional service.
services: Buy and sell engagement rings and wedding rings
Buy and sell luxury watches and timepieces
Buy and sell gold, silver, and precious metals bullion
Trade-in options for gems and stones
